reason: Current Trellis workflow and finish-work expectations.
Check acceptance criteria, API/DB/frontend contract, forbidden scope, and required tests.
Check expected files, code patterns, and scope boundaries discovered before implementation.
Verify ApiResponse/PageResponse, retrieve-first report, sensitive data boundary, and tests.
Verify schema/entity/DTO/frontend alignment and manual SQL migration.
Verify detail 404/403 and controller error behavior.
Verify no secrets/cookies/tokens/full bodies are logged or persisted.
Verify static tests, lint/build, no native dialogs, and compact list UI.
Verify modal/drawer accessibility and no duplicate overlay system.
Verify frontend guards for optional detail fields and API payload shape.
Verify DB/API/frontend field alignment and Good/Base/Bad coverage.
Verify no duplicate access-log controller/service/table/UI path.
Check detailJson mapping and existing analytics fields remain compatible.
Check detail_json writes, detail read mapping, existing visit lifecycle and list behavior.
Check list/delete permissions unchanged and detail endpoint uses PERM_ANALYTICS_VIEW.
Check safe request context propagation and tracking endpoints still no-op on failure.
Check article detail request context propagation without changing public API semantics.
Check view count/dedupe/fallback behavior preserved.
Check robots/sitemap access log behavior preserved.
Check fresh schema includes detail_json in analytics_page_views.
Check adminFetchPageViewLogDetail and no duplicate request wrapper.
Check compact list, detail button, grouped modal/drawer, non-SUPER_ADMIN view/delete split.
Check backend analytics tests cover detail_json and existing duration behavior.
Check request context tests updated for detail fields if applicable.
Check static tests assert compact list and detail UI contracts or companion test exists.
Check no native dialog regression.
